name: GuestFlow — ACE Electronics Visitor Management System
description: Customer invitation and check-in management system. Visitors arrive via kiosk iPad or the aceelectronics.com website. Backend is Express.js + Supabase PostgreSQL. Emails send via Microsoft Graph API (GCC High).

entry_points.description: CLICK HERE button on the 2026 MDEX/XPONENTIAL Attendees section
Unique QR code emailed to pre-registered customers links directly to check-in
Fixed iPad running the native iOS Capacitor app pointed at the deployed backend
Staff member scans a guest QR code at reception
ACE staff log into the admin dashboard

public.description: Public guest check-in form. Entry point from aceelectronics.com CLICK HERE button and QR code invitation emails.
features: Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA (visible or invisible mode)
CAPTCHA bypass window configurable by admin (captcha_bypass_start/end)
HMAC-signed timing token to detect bot speed
Configurable title, description, event info via page_settings

public.description: Full-screen kiosk app for the iPad at ACE HQ reception desk. Runs as native iOS app via Capacitor.
features: Idle screen with animated ACE logo (framer-motion entrance + float)
Returning visitor email lookup — auto-fills form for repeat visitors
Check-in form (name, email, phone, company, POC, US citizen, location)
Optional photo capture using device camera
Kiosk device auto-registration on first load
Periodic heartbeat to report device status (idle/active)

public.description: Staff-facing QR code scanner. Opens device camera, reads QR code, instantly checks in the pre-registered guest via /api/check-in/qr.
Admin login page. Username and password, session-based auth.

features: Send invitation email with QR code

protected_admin.description: Manual check-in by staff for a specific customer by lookup.
View and manage invitation statuses. Filter by pending/confirmed/checked-in.
Bulk import customers from CSV or Excel file. Parses client-side with PapaParse (CSV) or XLSX library.
Export visitor and lead data to CSV/Excel.

features: ACE POC roster management (add/remove POCs, set email addresses)
Kiosk device management (view devices, rename, set location, delete)
Visitor profile viewer with full history

authentication.description: Admin login. Validates username and password, creates server session.
Check whether the current admin session is active.

guest_checkin.description: Primary public guest check-in from aceelectronics.com or QR code link. Validates Turnstile CAPTCHA token and HMAC timing token. Creates lead record. Upserts CRM company and contact. Triggers MS365 Graph email notifications to POC and global list.
Register a new guest contact in the CRM without a full check-in.
Check in a pre-registered customer by their QR code value.
Check in a pre-registered customer by phone number lookup.
Check in a pre-registered customer by email lookup.

kiosk.description: Register kiosk device on first load using a device fingerprint. Creates or retrieves kiosk_devices record. Returns default location.
Periodic ping (every ~30s) from kiosk to update last_seen timestamp and current status.
Look up a returning visitor by email to auto-fill the kiosk form (name, company, POC).
Search visitors by name or email for kiosk autocomplete suggestions.
Full kiosk check-in. Creates visitor record (with optional base64 photo). Upserts CRM company and contact. Records document agreement. Triggers MS365 Graph email notifications.
Fetch kiosk display and behaviour settings (timeout, photo toggle, etc.).
List all registered kiosk devices with status and last-seen time.
Get info for the current device by its fingerprint.
Rename a kiosk device or set its default location.
Delete all unnamed/stale kiosk device registrations.
Delete a specific kiosk device registration.

customers.description: List all pre-registered customers ordered alphabetically.
Case-insensitive search across customer name, email, and phone.
Get a single customer by UUID.
Create a new pre-registered customer. Auto-generates a UUID QR code. Status defaults to 'pending'.
Update customer name, email, phone, or status.
Send invitation email with personalized QR code to the customer. Sets invited_at timestamp and status to 'confirmed'.
Mark a customer as checked-in. Sets checked_in_at and status to 'checked-in'.
Bulk import customers from parsed CSV/Excel rows. Auto-generates QR codes for each.

visitors.description: List all kiosk and walk-in visitor records.
db_ops: visitors.select all ORDER BY signed_in_at DESC

visitors.description: Full visitor profile by email or name: all visits, internal notes, merge history.
Get internal staff notes for a visitor by email or name lookup key.
Create or update internal staff notes for a visitor.
Count of visitor records with no US citizen/resident answer recorded.
Audit log of all visitor profile merge operations.
Merge two visitor profiles. Moves all visit records to the primary profile. Creates a merge event audit record.
db_ops: visitors.update source records to primary key

visitors.description: Update name, email, company, or phone across all visitor records matching a lookup key.
Delete all visitor records matching a lookup key (email or name).

leads.description: List all lead records created by /api/guest-checkin submissions.
db_ops: leads.select all ORDER BY submitted_at DESC

leads.description: Update a lead record (e.g. associate a customer ID).

crm.description: List all companies with total visit count.
db_ops: companies.select all with visit count JOIN visits

crm.description: Get a company with its full contact list and visit history.
List all contacts with total visit count.
db_ops: contacts.select all with visit count JOIN visits

crm.description: Get a contact with their full visit history and company info.

ace_pocs.description: List all ACE Points of Contact. Used to populate the POC dropdown on both check-in forms.
Add a new ACE POC to the roster.
Remove a POC from the roster.
Set the email address list for a POC. These addresses receive the personal 'is here to see you' email.

notification_emails.description: Get the global always-notify email list. These addresses receive a notification on every single check-in.
Update the global always-notify email list.

form_fields.description: List all custom form fields in display order.
Add a custom field to the check-in form (text, select, checkbox, etc.).
Update sort_order for all form fields (drag-and-drop reorder).
db_ops: form_fields.update sort_order for each id in ordered array

form_fields.description: Update a form field's label, type, placeholder, required flag, or options.

documents.description: List documents. Pass ?enabled=true to get only active documents shown to kiosk visitors.
db_ops: documents.select all ORDER BY sort_order (optionally WHERE enabled = true)

documents.description: Create a new document (NDA, visitor policy, etc.).

db_ops: documents.update sort_order for each id in ordered array

documents.description: Update document title, content, or enabled status.

page_settings.description: Fetch configurable page content by key (e.g. guest_checkin_page). Returns title, description, event info, CAPTCHA bypass window.
Create or update page settings for a given key.

analytics.description: Time-series visitor check-in counts. Query params: start (ISO date), end (ISO date), bucket (day | week | month).
db_ops: visitors.group by date_trunc(bucket, signed_in_at) WHERE signed_in_at BETWEEN start AND end

analytics.description: Monthly check-in totals for the dashboard bar chart.

security.description: Returns current CAPTCHA mode (visible/invisible) and an HMAC-signed timing token. Checks if the current time falls within the admin-configured CAPTCHA bypass window.
Current security configuration: CAPTCHA enabled, Turnstile configured, rate limiter active.
In-memory count of requests blocked by rate limiter and CAPTCHA validation failures.

qr_code.description: Generate a 400px PNG QR code data URL for any given ?url= query parameter. Uses the qrcode npm library server-side.

setup.description: Run Drizzle ORM schema migrations to initialize or update database tables.
Execute raw SQL import for bulk data loading.

database.validation: drizzle-zod — auto-generates Zod schemas from table definitions

tables.name: customers
tables.description: Pre-registered / invited guests. Each has a unique QR code. Status tracks invitation and check-in lifecycle.

columns.name: text NOT NULL
columns.qr_code: text NOT NULL UNIQUE — UUID generated server-side
columns.invited_at: timestamp nullable — set when invitation email sent
columns.metadata: text nullable — JSON string for extra fields

tables.name: visitors
tables.description: Every kiosk and walk-in check-in. One row per visit. Includes optional photo and document agreement.

columns.photo_data: text nullable — base64 encoded JPEG from kiosk camera
columns.documents_agreed: text nullable — comma-separated document titles agreed to

tables.name: leads
tables.description: Form submissions from /guest-check-in (aceelectronics.com CLICK HERE or QR invitation). Richer event data than visitors table.

tables.name: ace_pocs
tables.description: ACE Points of Contact roster. Names shown in dropdown on both check-in forms. Email arrays used to send personal notifications.

tables.name: page_settings
tables.description: Configurable content for public-facing pages and kiosk behaviour. Keyed by page identifier string.

tables.name: form_fields
tables.description: Admin-configured custom fields appended to the check-in form.

columns.label: text NOT NULL
columns.field_type: text default 'text' — text | select | checkbox | date etc
columns.options: text nullable — comma-separated options for select fields

tables.name: documents
tables.description: Documents guests must review and agree to on the kiosk (NDAs, visitor policies).

columns.title: text NOT NULL
columns.content: text NOT NULL — full document body text
columns.enabled: boolean default true — only enabled docs shown on kiosk

tables.name: kiosk_devices
tables.description: Registered iPad/kiosk devices. Auto-created on first load, identified by device fingerprint hash.

columns.device_id: text NOT NULL UNIQUE — browser fingerprint hash
columns.name: text nullable — admin-assigned friendly name
columns.default_location: text nullable — pre-fill location for this device

tables.name: companies
tables.description: CRM company records. Auto-upserted by name on every check-in.

tables.name: contacts
tables.description: CRM contact records linked to companies. Auto-upserted by email on every check-in.

tables.name: visits
tables.description: Individual visit events. One row per check-in, linking a contact to an event/location. Feeds CRM visit history.

tables.name: visitor_notes
tables.description: Internal staff notes about a visitor. One row per unique visitor (keyed by email or name).

columns.lookup_key: text NOT NULL UNIQUE — email or full_name

tables.name: visitor_merge_events
tables.description: Audit trail when two visitor profiles are merged by an admin.

columns.primary_key: text NOT NULL — email/name of the profile kept
columns.secondary_name: text NOT NULL — name of the profile absorbed
columns.visits_moved: integer NOT NULL — how many visit records were reassigned

email_service.transport: Microsoft Graph API — HTTP POST (no SMTP, no nodemailer)
email_service.required_azure_app_permission: Mail.Send (Application permission on Office 365 Exchange Online GCC High)
email_service.recipient_filter: Only sends to @aceelectronics.com addresses — all others silently dropped
email_service.deduplication: If an address appears in both POC list and global list, it only receives the POC email

email_types.trigger: Guest checks in AND selects a POC
email_types.recipients: Addresses in ace_pocs.emails for the selected POC
email_types.subject: {VisitorFullName} is here to see you
email_types.body_subline: Checked in at Ace Electronics HQ on {date/time CT}.

email_types.trigger: Guest checks in AND selects a POC
email_types.recipients: Global always-notify list (from page_settings), excluding any addresses already in POC list
email_types.subject: {VisitorFullName} is here — visiting {POCName}
email_types.body_subline: Checked in at Ace Electronics HQ on {date/time CT}.

email_types.trigger: Guest checks in WITHOUT selecting a POC
email_types.subject: {VisitorFullName} has checked in at Ace Electronics HQ
email_types.body_headline: {VisitorFullName} has checked in at Ace Electronics HQ.
email_types.body_subline: Checked in at Ace Electronics HQ on {date/time CT}.

email_types.trigger: Admin clicks Invite on a pre-registered customer
email_types.subject: You're invited — your QR code is inside
content: Event name, date, and location from page_settings

captcha.bypass_window: Admin can set captcha_bypass_start and captcha_bypass_end in page_settings. During this window CAPTCHA is skipped for known event attendees.

timing_token.description: HMAC-SHA256 signed token issued at form load time. Validated on submission to detect bots that submit instantly.

security.admin_auth: Session-based authentication via express-session. requireAuth middleware protects all admin-only API routes.

required.name: DATABASE_URL
required.description: Supabase PostgreSQL connection string (Neon serverless WebSocket format)

required.name: EMAIL_TENANT_ID
required.description: Azure AD GCC High Tenant ID

required.name: TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY
required.description: Cloudflare Turnstile server-side secret key (for server-side token verification)

required.name: VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY
required.description: Cloudflare Turnstile frontend site key (VITE_ prefix makes it available client-side)

required.name: FINGERPRINT_HMAC_SECRET
required.description: Secret for HMAC-signing timing tokens used in bot detection

optional.name: EMAIL_FROM_NAME
optional.description: Friendly sender display name in email clients. Default: ACE Guest Check-In

ios_app.server_url: Deployed backend URL configured in capacitor.config.ts — iPad always loads the live app from the server
ios_app.distribution: Direct USB install via Xcode — no App Store

update_strategy.backend_or_ui_change: Deploy updated server — iPad auto-reflects changes on next load, no Xcode rebuild needed
update_strategy.native_config_change: npm run build → npx cap sync ios → Xcode Archive → install via USB

frontend.name: Vite
frontend.purpose: Build tool and dev server with HMR

frontend.name: TanStack Query v5
frontend.purpose: Server state management and data fetching

frontend.name: framer-motion
frontend.purpose: Animations (kiosk idle logo entrance and float)

frontend.name: PapaParse
frontend.purpose: CSV parsing for bulk customer import

frontend.name: XLSX
frontend.purpose: Excel file parsing for bulk import

backend.name: MSAL Node (@azure/msal-node)
backend.purpose: Microsoft OAuth2 token acquisition for Graph API

guest_via_aceelectronics_website.description: Visitor clicks CLICK HERE on aceelectronics.com 2026 MDEX/XPONENTIAL section → completes check-in form → saved to database → email notifications sent
steps: GET /api/documents (if any documents to agree to)
Visitor fills form: title, firstName, lastName, email, phone, company, acePoc, usCitizen, location
→ MS365 Graph API: send POC email ('is here to see you')
→ MS365 Graph API: send global list email ('is here — visiting POC')

kiosk_walkin.description: Visitor walks up to reception iPad kiosk → optional returning visitor lookup → fills form → agrees to documents → optional photo → checks in → notifications sent
steps: Visitor reviews and agrees to documents
→ MS365 Graph API: send POC email
→ MS365 Graph API: send global list email
Success screen shown → auto-timeout → back to idle

qr_code_checkin.description: Pre-invited customer receives invitation email, scans QR code, and is instantly checked in
steps: → GET /api/generate-qr (generate QR PNG for check-in URL)
→ MS365 Graph API: send invitation email with QR code to customer
Customer receives email → scans QR code with phone

admin_bulk_import.description: Admin uploads a CSV or Excel file to pre-register many customers at once
steps: PapaParse (CSV) or XLSX library parses file client-side
POST /api/customers/import with array of customer objects
→ customers.insert (bulk) — auto-generates UUID QR code for each

admin_manage_notifications.description: Admin configures who gets notified on each check-in
steps: PATCH /api/ace-pocs/:id/emails — set email addresses for a POC
Changes take effect immediately on next check-in
